summary: ImageMagick image processing and conversion tool

options.name: adjoin
options.description: join images into a single multi-image file

options.name: affine
options.description: affine transform matrix

options.name: alpha
options.description: activate, deactivate, reset, or set the alpha channel

options.name: antialias
options.description: remove pixel-aliasing

options.name: authenticate
options.description: decipher image with this password

options.name: attenuate
options.description: lessen (or intensify) when adding noise to an image

options.name: background
options.description: background color

options.name: bias
options.description: add bias when convolving an image

options.name: black-point-compensation
options.description: use black point compensation

options.name: blue-primary
options.description: chromaticity blue primary point

options.name: bordercolor
options.description: border color

options.name: caption
options.description: assign a caption to an image

options.name: clip
options.description: clip along the first path from the 8BIM profile

options.name: clip-mask
options.description: associate a clip mask with the image

options.name: clip-path
options.description: clip along a named path from the 8BIM profile

options.name: colorspace
options.description: alternate image colorspace

options.name: comment
options.description: annotate image with comment

options.name: compose
options.description: set image composite operator

options.name: compress
options.description: type of pixel compression when writing the image

options.name: define
options.description: define one or more image format options

options.name: delay
options.description: display the next image after pausing

options.name: density
options.description: horizontal and vertical density of the image

options.name: depth
options.description: image depth

options.name: direction
options.description: render text right-to-left or left-to-right

options.name: display
options.description: get image or font from this X server

options.name: dispose
options.description: layer disposal method

options.name: dither
options.description: apply error diffusion to image

options.name: encoding
options.description: text encoding type

options.name: endian
options.description: endianness (MSB or LSB) of the image

options.name: family
options.description: render text with this font family

options.name: features
options.description: analyze image features (e.g. contrast, correlation)

options.name: fill
options.description: color to use when filling a graphic primitive

options.name: filter
options.description: use this filter when resizing an image

options.name: font
options.description: render text with this font

options.name: format
options.description: output formatted image characteristics

options.name: fuzz
options.description: colors within this distance are considered equal

options.name: gravity
options.description: horizontal and vertical text placement

options.name: green-primary
options.description: chromaticity green primary point

options.name: illuminant
options.description: reference illuminant

options.name: intensity
options.description: method to generate an intensity value from a pixel

options.name: intent
options.description: type of rendering intent when managing the image color

options.name: interlace
options.description: type of image interlacing scheme

options.name: interline-spacing
options.description: set the space between two text lines

options.name: interpolate
options.description: pixel color interpolation method

options.name: interword-spacing
options.description: set the space between two words

options.name: kerning
options.description: set the space between two letters

options.name: label
options.description: assign a label to an image

options.name: limit
options.description: pixel cache resource limit

options.name: loop
options.description: add Netscape loop extension to your GIF animation

options.name: matte
options.description: store matte channel if the image has one

options.name: mattecolor
options.description: frame color

options.name: moments
options.description: report image moments

options.name: monitor
options.description: monitor progress

options.name: orient
options.description: image orientation

options.name: page
options.description: size and location of an image canvas (setting)

options.name: ping
options.description: efficiently determine image attributes

options.name: pointsize
options.description: font point size

options.name: precision
options.description: maximum number of significant digits to print

options.name: preview
options.description: image preview type

options.name: quality
options.description: JPEG/MIFF/PNG compression level

options.name: quiet
options.description: suppress all warning messages

options.name: read-mask
options.description: associate a read mask with the image

options.name: red-primary
options.description: chromaticity red primary point

options.name: regard-warnings
options.description: pay attention to warning messages

options.name: remap
options.description: transform image colors to match this set of colors

options.name: repage
options.description: size and location of an image canvas

options.name: respect-parentheses
options.description: settings remain in effect until parenthesis boundary

options.name: sampling-factor
options.description: horizontal and vertical sampling factor

options.name: scene
options.description: image scene number

options.name: seed
options.description: seed a new sequence of pseudo-random numbers

options.name: size
options.description: width and height of image

options.name: stretch
options.description: render text with this font stretch

options.name: stroke
options.description: graphic primitive stroke color

options.name: strokewidth
options.description: graphic primitive stroke width

options.name: style
options.description: render text with this font style

options.name: support
options.description: resize support: > 1.0 is blurry, < 1.0 is sharp

options.name: synchronize
options.description: synchronize image to storage device

options.name: taint
options.description: declare the image as modified

options.description: tile offset

options.name: transparent-color
options.description: transparent color

options.name: units
options.description: the units of image resolution

options.description: print detailed information about the image

options.name: view
options.description: FlashPix viewing transforms

options.name: virtual-pixel

options.name: weight
options.description: render text with this font weight

options.name: white-point
options.description: chromaticity white point

options.description: associate a write mask with the image

options.name: word-break
options.description: sets whether line breaks appear wherever the text would otherwise overflow

options.name: adaptive-blur
options.description: adaptively blur pixels; decrease effect near edges

options.description: adaptively resize image using 'mesh' interpolation

options.name: adaptive-sharpen
options.description: adaptively sharpen pixels; increase effect near edges

options.name: annotate
options.description: annotate the image with text

options.name: auto-gamma
options.description: automagically adjust gamma level of image

options.description: automagically adjust color levels of image

options.description: automagically orient (rotate) image

options.name: auto-threshold
options.description: automatically perform image thresholding

options.name: bench
options.description: measure performance

options.description: non-linear, edge-preserving, and noise-reducing smoothing filter

options.name: black-threshold
options.description: force all pixels below the threshold into black

options.name: blue-shift
options.description: simulate a scene at nighttime in the moonlight

options.name: blur
options.description: reduce image noise and reduce detail levels

options.name: border
options.description: surround image with a border of color

options.name: brightness-contrast
options.description: improve brightness / contrast of the image

options.name: canny
options.description: detect edges in the image

options.description: color correct with a color decision list

options.name: channel
options.description: set the image channel mask

options.name: charcoal
options.description: simulate a charcoal drawing

options.description: remove pixels from the image interior

options.description: keep pixel values in range (0-QuantumRange)

options.name: colorize
options.description: colorize the image with the fill color

options.name: color-matrix
options.description: apply color correction to the image

options.name: colors
options.description: preferred number of colors in the image

options.name: connected-components
options.description: connected-components uniquely labeled

options.name: contrast

options.name: distort
options.description: distort images according to given method and args

options.name: draw
options.description: annotate the image with a graphic primitive

options.name: edge
options.description: apply a filter to detect edges in the image

options.name: encipher
options.description: convert plain pixels to cipher pixels

options.name: emboss
options.description: emboss an image

options.description: apply a digital filter to enhance a noisy image

options.name: equalize
options.description: perform histogram equalization to an image

options.name: evaluate
options.description: evaluate an arithmetic, relational, or logical expression

options.name: extent
options.description: set the image size

options.name: extract
options.description: extract area from image

options.name: fft

options.name: flip
options.description: flip image vertically

options.description: floodfill the image with color

options.name: flop

options.name: function
options.description: apply function over image values

options.name: gamma
options.description: level of gamma correction

options.name: gaussian-blur
options.description: reduce image noise and reduce detail levels

options.name: geometry
options.description: preferred size or location of the image

options.description: transform image to span the full range of colors

options.description: simulate an oil painting

options.description: pixel value less than |epsilon| become epsilon or -epsilon

options.description: reshape the image

options.description: resize the image
